def negative_tuple_unpacking_in_tight_loop():
    rule_id = "tuple_unpacking_in_tight_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Tuple unpacking is repeated in tight loops where reducing per-iteration overhead may help."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
